div.head: The Chargé in Cuba (Reed) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 57. Chase Bank Manager informs me $20,000,000 public works credit was today extended for additional 60 days.

Decree published yesterday orders payment of $1,793,000 still due Warren Brothers for road work. Payment to be made at the rate of $50,000 per month from unobligated ports improvement revenues. This would indicate that proposed issue of $10,000,000 treasury notes referred to in the Department’s instruction No. 548, April 30,See footnote 82, p. 550. has now been abandoned since no other revenues are available as security.
